word: H3735 - כָּרָא - Kârâʼ - kaw-raw' - Be grieved

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּרא

Transliteration: kârâ'

Phonetic: kaw-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Ithpeel) to be distressed, be grieved

Origin: probably corresponding to H3738 in sense of piercing (fig.)

TWOT entry: TWOT - 2799

Part(s) of speech: Verb
